description.ko: AQUA-5는 극한의 수압을 견디며 바다에서 가장 깊고 어두운 해구의 숨겨진 경이로움을 포착하기 위해 설계된 최첨단 심해 자율 탐사 로봇입니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art deep-sea autonomous unit designed to withstand extreme pressure and capture the hidden wonders of the ocean's darkest trenches.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of AQUA-5, a sleek bioluminescent underwater exploration droid, navigating through the dark Hadal zone. Glowing neon azure lights, bubbles rising from thermal vents, ancient rock formations, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, ray tracing, deep blue and black color palette.
